text.title: Gemini Multimodal Failure Modes
text.summary: Five recurring multimodal failures with symptom / root-cause / fix.

antipattern.root-cause: Default code path inlines bytes instead of using Files API.
antipattern.fix: Files API for any video / audio / >4MB image total (rule r1).

antipattern.description: Send during PROCESSING — no ACTIVE poll.
antipattern.symptom: Intermittent 400 with "file not active" depending on file size.
antipattern.fix: Poll file.state with timeout until ACTIVE; abort on FAILED (rule r2).

antipattern.description: Ignore 48h TTL — file id reused indefinitely.
antipattern.symptom: 404 on file id after 2 days; conversation breaks.
antipattern.root-cause: Files API treated as permanent storage.
antipattern.fix: Track upload_at; re-upload near expiry; cache id ↔ source-path mapping (rule r3).

antipattern.description: No context cache for a 100K-token PDF reused 50 times.
antipattern.symptom: Bill 4x what it should be for the analysis pipeline.
antipattern.root-cause: Caching considered optional rather than default for repeat docs.
antipattern.fix: Cache when ≥3 reuses AND ≥32K tokens (rule r4).

antipattern.description: BLOCK_REASON on image input silently coerced to empty string.
antipattern.symptom: "AI returned nothing" support tickets on certain images.
antipattern.root-cause: Caller forgot to surface finish_reason on multimodal calls.
antipattern.fix: Same handler as text calls; never swallow finish_reason (rule r5).
